title: neocryptodiscus
intro: Neocryptodiscus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a type of daisy. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. Some of the health benefits associated with Neocryptodiscus include reduced inflammation and improved immune function, which can be beneficial in treating conditions such as arthritis and allergies. Neocryptodiscus is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
